docs.name: Spotlight Card
docs.description: Card with a radial spotlight that follows the mouse cursor across its surface.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS classes for sizing and styling the card layout.

props.name: spotlightColor
props.description: The hex/rgba color code used for the center cursor glow.

props.name: spotlightSize
props.description: Diameter width/height of the gradient spotlight in pixels.

props.name: theme
props.description: Color theme for the card surface and border.

docs.overview: SpotlightCard tracks your cursor and projects a soft radial light on the card surface, creating a sense of physical depth. Ideal anywhere you need premium-feeling content cards.

scenarios.title: Pricing tier card
scenarios.description: Make pricing options feel tactile and premium — spotlight highlights the selected plan naturally.

scenarios.title: Team member profile card
scenarios.description: Spotlight turns a standard team grid into an interactive, warm experience.

scenarios.title: Feature highlight card
scenarios.description: Wrap each feature description in a spotlight card to make your feature grid feel alive.
